overview.description: Under normal circumstances, at least 80% of its net assets, plus borrowings for investment purposes, will be invested in credit-related securities, or ETFs that invest, under normal circumstances, at least 80% of their net assets, plus borrowings for investment purposes, in credit-related securities. Credit-related securities include fixed-income securities, debt securities and loans and investments with economic characteristics similar to fixed-income securities, debt securities and loans.
